data.title: Legal Ruling Casts Uncertainty on Group Supporter Prosecutions
data.description: A recent legal decision has raised questions about the validity of numerous prosecutions against individuals supporting a particular group. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the implications of this ruling, which could potentially affect hundreds of cases. Legal experts are now examining the decision's impact on ongoing and future prosecutions, as authorities reassess their strategies in light of the ruling. The uncertainty surrounding these cases underscores the complexities involved in prosecuting supporters of controversial groups, prompting a reevaluation of legal approaches and enforcement policies.

data.title: California Pension Fund Increases Stake in Bitcoin Treasury Firm
data.description:
The California Public Employees' Retirement Fund has increased its holdings in the Bitcoin treasury company, Strategy, by acquiring an additional 22,475 shares. According to ChainCatcher, this brings the fund's total shares in the company to 470,632, valued at approximately $59 million.

The retirement fund manages assets totaling around $611 billion.

data.title: Openclaw Founder Discusses Acquisition Offers and Open Source Commitment
data.description:
Openclaw founder Peter Steinberger recently confirmed during an interview with Lex Fridman that the company has received acquisition offers from multiple firms. According to BlockBeats, Steinberger expressed disinterest in potential financing deals worth millions or billions, citing concerns over time consumption and conflicts of interest, such as prioritizing enterprise versions and altering open-source licenses, which could harm the community. He emphasized his desire for completely free open-source solutions without conditions, noting that relying on donations is unsustainable, as evidenced by popular projects like Tailwind undergoing layoffs.

Steinberger also revealed that Openclaw is currently operating at a loss, with monthly revenues ranging from $10,000 to $20,000, while subsidizing personally maintained dependent projects. Although companies like OpenAI provide some support, the situation remains unsustainable.

Regarding collaboration with large laboratories, Steinberger stated that the core condition is maintaining the project's open-source nature, similar to Chrome and Chromium. He stressed the importance of not entrusting the project entirely to a single company and highlighted the unique community atmosphere of ClawCon, reminiscent of the early internet enthusiasm. Steinberger aims to spread this spirit to more people, considering this year as the beginning of personal agency, with laboratory collaboration being the fastest way to achieve this. He also expressed interest in experiencing work within a large company, as he has never done so before.

data.title: Market news: California Public Employees Retirement System (CalPERS) increased its holdings of MSTR stock by 22,000 shares.
data.description: BitcoinTreasuries.NET reported on the X platform that the California State Public Employees Retirement Fund (CalSTR), the largest pension fund in the United States managing $611 billion in assets, increased its holdings of MSTR stock by 22,475 shares, bringing its total holdings to 470,632 shares, with a value of $59 million.

data.title: Health Monitor to Launch Following Prognosis Newsletter Conclusion
data.description: The Prognosis newsletter is concluding its run, making way for a new initiative called Health Monitor, which will commence on March 5. Bloomberg posted on X, announcing the transition and highlighting the upcoming focus on health-related topics. This change marks a new chapter in delivering health news and insights to readers.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Transatlantic Alliance Faces Challenges Under Trump's Presidency
data.description:
The transatlantic alliance between the United States and Europe is experiencing strain following U.S. President Donald Trump's return to office. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the growing tensions and disagreements that have emerged between the two regions. The alliance, which has historically been a cornerstone of international relations, is now facing challenges due to differing political agendas and priorities.

Under Trump's leadership, the U.S. has adopted policies that have led to disagreements with European leaders, affecting diplomatic relations and cooperation on various global issues. These tensions have raised concerns about the future of the alliance and its ability to effectively address international challenges.

The current geopolitical landscape is marked by a shift in focus towards national interests, which has contributed to the fissures within the alliance. As both regions navigate these complexities, the long-term implications for global stability and cooperation remain uncertain.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong Stock Index to Include CATL, CMOC, and Laopu Gold
data.description: Hong Kong's benchmark stock index is set to include three new companies: electric vehicle battery-maker CATL, miner CMOC, and jeweler Laopu Gold. Bloomberg posted on X that this move aims to diversify the index and reflect the evolving market landscape. The inclusion of these companies highlights the growing importance of the electric vehicle and mining sectors, as well as the luxury goods market in Hong Kong's economy. This change is expected to attract more investors and enhance the index's representation of key industries.

data.title: DeFiance CEO: Crypto VC is dead; in the future, we will only invest in pure cash flow businesses.
data.description: In an article published on X, DeFiance Capital CEO Arthur stated that the cryptocurrency market has undergone a complete transformation—shifting from a valuation system based on venture capital backing and growth to one centered on short-term cash flow generation, as this is the most likely path to substantial returns for investors. Investors who haven't grasped this shift will only endlessly deplete their capital. Arthur: "Venture capital crypto is dead, cash flow crypto is immortal. All new projects I invest in in the future must be pure cash flow businesses, recouping all invested capital within 6 to 12 months and achieving a 3 to 5x return solely from cash flow. Any project that only hypes growth concepts will no longer work."

data.title: Brazilian House Proposes National Bitcoin Reserve Strategy
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). The Brazilian House of Representatives has introduced a substitute proposal, PL4501/2024, through its Economic Development Committee, aiming to establish a National Bitcoin Strategic Reserve (RESBit). The plan outlines the accumulation of at least one million Bitcoins over a five-year period. Additionally, the proposal includes provisions for allowing Bitcoin to be used for tax payments and offers income tax exemptions on capital gains from digital assets. It also enshrines the rights of users to self-custody and transfer digital assets.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Ukrainian Writer Challenges Kremlin's War Narrative
data.description: Ukrainian author Andrey Kurkov has dismissed claims from the Kremlin regarding Russia's progress in the ongoing conflict, asserting that Russia is not achieving victory. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Kurkov's rejection of Russian propaganda after four years of war. Kurkov, known for his critical stance on the conflict, argues that the narrative of Russian success is misleading and does not reflect the reality on the ground. His comments come amid ongoing tensions and military engagements between Russia and Ukraine, with both sides experiencing significant challenges. Kurkov's perspective adds to the discourse surrounding the conflict, emphasizing the need for accurate representation of the situation.

data.title: Standard Chartered Lowers Ethereum Price Target for End-2026
data.description: Scott Melker, host of The Wolf Of All Streets Podcast, posted on X that Standard Chartered has revised its Ethereum price target for the end of 2026. The bank reduced its forecast from $7,500 to $4,000, indicating a more conservative outlook for Ethereum's future value.

data.title: StreetAccount Daily Podcast Offers Market Updates
data.description: The StreetAccount Daily Podcast provides listeners with timely and relevant updates on financial markets. FactSet posted on X that the podcast serves as a reliable source for quick insights into market trends and developments. It aims to keep investors informed about significant financial news, ensuring they do not miss crucial updates. The podcast covers a range of topics, including market movements, economic indicators, and other pertinent financial information. By tuning in, listeners can stay ahead of market changes and make informed investment decisions.

data.title: Espresso Develops Decentralized Sequencer to Address Rollup Fragmentation
data.description: Espresso is developing a decentralized shared sequencer and confirmation layer to tackle the challenges of Rollup fragmentation and centralized sequencing. According to NS3.AI, the company's HotShot consensus mechanism is designed to provide rapid finality and improve censorship resistance by ensuring only confirmed blocks are settled on Ethereum. With tools and integrations spanning over 20 blockchains, Espresso seeks to position itself as a key infrastructure component within the modular Rollup ecosystem.

data.title: Telegram's TON Blockchain Aims for Mass Adoption with Unique Integration
data.description: Telegram's TON blockchain is strategically positioned for widespread adoption, leveraging its integration with the Telegram platform, which boasts one billion users. According to NS3.AI, TON distinguishes itself through a consumer-friendly design, featuring intuitive onboarding processes, social NFTs, and robust institutional-grade infrastructure. The project is addressing U.S. regulatory challenges while concentrating on scalability, user-friendliness, and a smooth transition from Web2 to Web3.

data.title: Debate Over AI Tools and Misappropriation of Images
data.description: AI tools such as Grok are increasingly being used to create sexualized images of real individuals, raising concerns about the boundaries of free speech and the potential for misappropriation. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ethical and legal implications of these technologies. Critics argue that the creation of such images should be considered illegal, as it infringes on personal rights and privacy. The debate continues as society grapples with the rapid advancement of AI and its impact on individual freedoms and protections.

data.title: Global RWA Summit 2026 Commences with Support from Hong Kong Government
data.description: Jack Kong, CEO of Nano Labs, posted on X that the inaugural Global RWA Summit (ITA 2026) has officially begun. The event is organized by Bauhinia Magazine in collaboration with the RWA International Federation and other organizations. It has received guidance from the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region Government's Innovation, Technology and Industry Bureau, establishing itself as a landmark event in the RWA sector.

data.title: Binance Announces Top 5 Winners in Recent Competition
data.description:
Binance announced on X the results of its latest competition, revealing the top five winners who excelled in the event. The first place was claimed by @straw_hat1688, showcasing exceptional performance and earning the top spot. Following closely, @BNBliunian secured the second position, demonstrating impressive skills and strategy.

In third place, @xxk_hl made a notable impact, while the fourth position was taken by 0x05a...d2e, highlighting their competitive edge. Rounding out the top five, @CyptoVVV achieved recognition for their efforts and participation. This announcement celebrates the achievements of these individuals, acknowledging their success in the competition. The event underscores Binance's commitment to fostering a competitive environment and rewarding excellence within its community.

data.title: Apple's Market Impact on Ethereum Capitalization
data.description: Stacy Muur posted on X that Apple has wiped out the entire Ethereum capitalization today. This development raises questions about the timing of investments in the cryptocurrency market, suggesting that investors might be either very early or too late. The situation highlights the volatility and unpredictability of the crypto market, as major corporate actions can significantly influence digital asset valuations. The future will reveal the implications of such market dynamics.

data.title: Musk's Vision for Tesla Includes Robotaxis and Chipmaking
data.description: Elon Musk's expansive vision for Tesla encompasses the development of robotaxis, humanoid robots, and ventures into chipmaking. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges of transforming a car company into a technology giant. Musk's ambitions reflect a broader strategy to diversify Tesla's offerings beyond electric vehicles, aiming to position the company at the forefront of technological innovation. Despite the inherent difficulties, Musk's plans underscore his commitment to pushing the boundaries of what Tesla can achieve in the tech industry.

data.title: AI Market Stories Compared to Crypto Market Sentiment
data.description: Crypto KOL Yuyue (@yuyue_chris) posted on X, drawing a comparison between the capital market stories of AI companies like Zhipu and MiniMax and the current sentiment in the cryptocurrency market. Yuyue likened the difference to that between a renowned celebrity, Liu Yifei, and a local girl, suggesting that while both may have their merits, the allure of the celebrity is undeniable. The current state of the cryptocurrency market, according to Yuyue, lacks excitement and vigor, leading to a sense of waiting for the return of liquidity. This situation, he humorously noted, is akin to having to sit at the children's table during a village feast this year.
